type.markdownDescription: Field type to use to generate auto-embeddings for vector search.
type.description: Field type to use to generate auto-embeddings for vector search.

path.markdownDescription: Name of the text field to use as a data source for generating embeddings. Use dot notation for embedded fields.
path.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDB field naming restrictions. To learn more, see [Field Names](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/mdb-field-names) .

model.description: Embedding model to use to generate embeddings.
model.markdownDescription:
Embedding model to use to generate embeddings. 
Values include:
- `voyage-3-large`
- `voyage-3.5`
- `voyage-3.5-lite`
